class.help: Registra todos los conocimientos en Informática que se pueden utilizar en el sistema.
class.label: Informática
class.name: INFORMATICA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_informatica as oi_informatica, t0.c_informatica as c_informatica, t0.d_informatica as d_informatica, SEC.policy, t0.c_informatica as CODE, t0.d_informatica as TEXT FROM SDP08_INFORMATICA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Informatica.INFORMATICA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_informatica LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_informatica asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_informatica as oi_informatica, SEC.policy FROM SDP08_INFORMATICA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Informatica.INFORMATICA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_informatica LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_informatica asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Informatica.INFORMATICA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Informatica.INFORMATICA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP08_INFORMATICA.oi_informatica) as CNT from SDP08_INFORMATICA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP08_INFORMATICA.oi_informatica={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP08_INFORMATICA.d_informatica,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP08_INFORMATICA.c_informatica,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
